checks.title: Verify existence of implementation evidence
checks.description: Locate and confirm that documentary evidence of 'Governance Obligation Compliance' implementation exists in the evidence repository.
checks.command_parameters: Access the Board Secretariat or corporate secretarial records system. Retrieve Board and Risk Committee meeting minutes for the relevant period.
checks.expected_result: Evidence documents are present, dated within the verification period, and signed by the responsible owner.
checks.reasoning: Document existence is verifiable by an independent reviewer without requiring departmental cooperation.

checks.title: Assess Adequacy of Evidence Against Control Objective
checks.description: Review evidence content to confirm it adequately demonstrates compliance with the control objective for 'Governance Obligation Compliance'.
checks.command_parameters: Apply compliance review checklist. Document findings.
checks.expected_result: Board has discussed and minuted relevant regulatory agenda items. Risk oversight Committee meeting held at prescribed frequency. Quorum requirements met.
checks.reasoning: Adequacy assessment requires professional judgment from an independent reviewer.

checks.title: Auditor Sign-Off on Verification Outcome
checks.description: The reviewing auditor or compliance officer formally records the outcome of verification.
checks.command_parameters: Record findings in the compliance management system. Attach evidence references.
checks.expected_result: Verification outcome (PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL) recorded with auditor signature and timestamp.
checks.reasoning: Formal sign-off creates an immutable audit trail independent of the implementing department.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.title: Verify Audit Policy — Logon Events
checks.description: Confirm logon and logoff events are audited for both success and failure.
checks.command_parameters: Run as Administrator.
checks.expected_result: Logon: Success and Failure
checks.reasoning: Audit policy state for specific subcategories is directly machine-readable.

checks.title: Verify Audit Policy — Object Access
checks.description: Confirm object access events (file, registry) are audited.
checks.command_parameters: Run as Administrator.
checks.expected_result: File System: Success and Failure
checks.reasoning: File system audit state is readable via auditpol.

checks.title: Verify Security Event Log Size and Retention
checks.description: Confirm the Security event log is configured with adequate retention.
checks.command_parameters: Run as Administrator.
checks.expected_result: maxSize >= 104857600 (100MB); retention: 0 (overwrite as needed) or configured.
checks.reasoning: Event log configuration is directly queryable without departmental input.

checks.title: Verify Recent Security Events Exist
checks.description: Confirm that security events are being generated and not suppressed.
checks.command_parameters: Run on target host. Confirm timestamp is recent.
checks.expected_result: Timestamp within last 24 hours.
checks.reasoning: Presence of recent events confirms the logging pipeline is active.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.command_parameters: Apply compliance review checklist. Document findings.
checks.expected_result: Board has discussed and minuted relevant regulatory agenda items. Risk oversight Committee meeting held at prescribed frequency. Quorum requirements met.
checks.reasoning: Adequacy assessment requires professional judgment from an independent reviewer.

checks.title: Auditor Sign-Off on Verification Outcome
checks.description: The reviewing auditor or compliance officer formally records the outcome of verification.
checks.command_parameters: Record findings in the compliance management system. Attach evidence references.
checks.expected_result: Verification outcome (PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL) recorded with auditor signature and timestamp.
checks.reasoning: Formal sign-off creates an immutable audit trail independent of the implementing department.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.description: Review evidence content to confirm it adequately demonstrates compliance with the control objective for 'Regulatory Best Practice Advisory'.
checks.command_parameters: Apply compliance review checklist. Document findings.
checks.expected_result: Evidence of implementation consistent with the control objective. Documentary proof of recommendation fulfilment. No contradictory evidence found during walkthrough.
checks.reasoning: Adequacy assessment requires professional judgment from an independent reviewer.

checks.title: Auditor Sign-Off on Verification Outcome
checks.description: The reviewing auditor or compliance officer formally records the outcome of verification.
checks.command_parameters: Record findings in the compliance management system. Attach evidence references.
checks.expected_result: Verification outcome (PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL) recorded with auditor signature and timestamp.
checks.reasoning: Formal sign-off creates an immutable audit trail independent of the implementing department.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.
